title: Ubiquiti UVC-G4-IRExtender - IR Range Extender for UVC-G4-Bullet
description: UVC-G4-IRExtender is an optional accessory for the UVC-G4-Bullet camera. It is IR with a long range of up to 25m. The undeniable advantage is the simplicity of installation and connection to the camera body GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
